patch.value: Vision: pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: project management = context management. This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live here as concrete, dedup-checked work.
Forward-looking roadmap milestone anchoring the open, living backlog for pm-cli beyond v0.1. Complements (does not duplicate) the closed PRD delivery milestones.
Deliver a universal, fully-customizable PM tool whose baseline primitives (via the pm SDK) adapt to any project
A discoverable forward backlog turns the tracker from a completed-work log into a living context map for humans and agents
Tracker had 902 items but zero open/forward work; pm context returned empty. This milestone seeds the forward layer.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-06-07 ecosystem audit (plan pm-8u2a): rebuilt the empty forward backlog — 71 new OPEN items across all 9 capability epics + 2 new ADRs (pm-7sq6 coverage governance, pm-cc04 agent self-repair). Delivered by 5 specialized audit sub-agents (disjoint epic scopes). pm context now returns actionable leaf work again.

patch.value: Living backlog reflects the entire ecosystem; every capability epic has defined acceptance and active children; periodic audits keep zero orphan open items and zero untracked work streams.

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value:
## Vision
pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: **project management = context management** — an agent must be able to rebuild full working context from the pm CLI alone.

This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2; last reconciled by audit #4 pm-osea on 2026-07-04). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live under the relevant capability epic as concrete, dedup-checked work.

## Living capability epics (index)
Each is a permanently-open living backlog; new work in that area lands there. Scope In/Out boundaries are stated in each epic charter so no two overlap.

- pm-mpbb — CLI command surface & agent ergonomics
- pm-o2kc — Storage, history & data durability
- pm-ydp6 — Search & semantic retrieval
- pm-ugqx — Extension & package platform maturity (incl. SDK, plugins)
- pm-33cw — Governance, validation & data quality
- pm-dj98 — Concurrency & multi-agent safety
- pm-5oj5 — Observability, telemetry & health
- pm-8jdc — Schema, config & universal customization (incl. profiles)
- pm-5k4v — MCP server & contract platform
- pm-92if — CodeFactor / source-code quality (A→A+)
- pm-u9d0 — Docs, onboarding, release & CI
- pm-m2u1 — Architecture Decision Records (living decision log)

## Convention
Capability epics stay OPEN even with zero open children (living backlogs). Audits are CREATE-ONLY on closed items (changelog buckets by updated_at). Every pm validate/health warning maps to exactly one open remediation item.

message: Audit #4: enumerate the 12 living capability epics as a roadmap index; add pm-33cw governance epic

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Audit evidence 2026-07-04 continuation: inspected all statuses with pm list --status all, pm stats, pm aggregate, pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift, pm health --check-only --summary, pm next, active duplicate-title scan, active parent-link scan, and live gh issue/pr list. Live totals: 1506 pm items, 1514 history streams, 24446 history entries. Status distribution: 37 open, 13 in_progress, 1444 closed, 12 canceled, 0 blocked. Type distribution: 1 Milestone, 81 Epics, 286 Features, 286 Issues, 524 Tasks, 224 Chores, 17 Plans, 50 Decisions, 36 Stories, 1 Reminder. Active structure: 50 active items, zero active non-epic orphans, zero duplicate-looking active titles, pm next ready=36 blocked=0. GitHub cross-check: one open issue GH-427, already tracked by in_progress pm-lt6n; zero open PRs. Existing broad audit lineages pm-y904 and pm-osea are closed with evidence and remain canonical, so no duplicate audit item was created. Residual governance: validate reports validate_resolution_missing_fields:268 on closed historical items, already represented by open pm-e9zh; active metadata filter only flags claimed epic pm-4ak1 for missing estimate/reviewer/sprint/release metadata, noted there without taking over the claim.
